title: Stop Traefik basic-auth popup loop on API polling
root_cause: All paths used Traefik auth middleware; each /api fetch without cached Basic header returned 401 WWW-Authenticate Basic → browser re-prompt. AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=false + placeholder OIDC blocked API even when Traefik passed.
fix: Split Traefik routers: /api, /analytics, /health without auth (priority 100); SPA with auth. External profile forces AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=true and clears OIDC_ISSUER_URL.
